channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: UN's First AI Safety Panel Says Scientists Can't Rule Out 'Catastrophic Harm'
item.description: A 40-scientist panel found that AI capabilities are outrunning both scientific understanding and government oversight.

item.title: Bitcoin bear market ‘dead’ after first TD9 reversal signal since July 2022 fires
item.description: Bitcoin bear-market bottom signs appear as the TD9 indicator mirrors the final stages of the 2022 BTC price downtrend.

item.title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Hits New Low Price Ahead of Reverse Stock Split
item.description: Bitcoin mining firm American Bitcoin fell to a new low price Wednesday, one day before executing a 1-for-15 reverse stock split.

item.title: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
item.description: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

item.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain as it expands deeper into crypto
item.description: Robinhood's product push continues to blur the line between crypto and more traditional finance.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation lays out use cases for governments, institutions in new policy guide
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation said policymakers should distinguish between decentralized public blockchains and networks that remain controlled by corporations or foundations, arguing that governance structures will play a critical role in deter…

item.title: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
item.description: Analysts don't think the threat of a new stablecoin launch was enough to warrant a major Circle (CRCL) sell-off on Tuesday.

item.title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
item.description: Crypto ATM's are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.

item.title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
item.description: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.

item.title: Bitcoin price returns to $60K as US dollar strength rejects weekly high
item.description: Bitcoin started July with a bang, rallying above $60,000 as traders predict a relief rally as the “base case” throughout the month.

item.title: Bitcoin Pops Off 21-Month Low to $60K as Soft Data Eases Rate-Hike Fears
item.description: BTC recovered from local lows to $60,000 after softer U.S. jobs and factory data revived hopes the Fed's hawkish turn could be easing.

item.title: Ethereum backers launch nonprofit to lead institutional adoption efforts
item.description: Backed by Joe Lubin, BitMine and SharpLink, the independent organization will serve as a liaison for financial institutions exploring Ethereum as competition for institutional capital heats up.

item.title: Ahead of NYSE Listing, Securitize Exec Says DeFi Can Break Wall Street's Grip on Stock Lending
item.description: Securitize President Brett Redfearn argues that tokenization will bring crypto's core benefit of disintermediation to retail investors.

item.title: Anthropic Bringing Claude Fable 5 Back Online as US Lifts Export Controls
item.description: The Trump administration reversed its shutdown order after weeks of talks, with Anthropic tying Fable 5's return to a new safety classifier and other moves.

item.title: Jefferies warns against buying the dip in Circle as Open USD raises new competition fears
item.description: The investment bank said new competition from the Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium could pressure USDC's growth.

item.title: Cantor says bitcoin bear market may be entering final stretch
item.description: The bank said in a note bitcoin's cycle points to a market bottom in the coming months, urging investors to focus on networks with durable value accrual.

item.title: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
item.description: Shares in top Solana treasury firm Forward Industries are jumping Wedesday after announcing that it added over 500,000 SOL to its stash.

item.title: Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400 million crypto Ponzi case
item.description: Christopher Delgado allegedly used investor funds for a lavish lifestyle, including luxury properties and vehicles, while running a fraudulent scheme from 2023 to 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin breaks above $60,000 after Fed Chair Warsh said inflation risks has come down
item.description: The Fed chair reiterated the central bank's commitment to its 2% inflation target while signaling artificial intelligence could reshape the economy and monetary policy.

item.title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
item.description: Crédit Agricole’s CACEIS launches a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum with 20.02 million tokens issued, targeting institutional flows and tokenized fund access.

item.title: EthLabs launches as Ethereum undergoes its biggest leadership transition in years
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re diving into the creation of EthLabs, and why it was launched during a period of transition for the ecosystem.

item.title: Europe's MiCA rollout sparks debate over who wins under new crypto rules
item.description: As Europe's crypto rulebook takes full effect, industry leaders agree regulation is here to stay, but disagree over whether it protects consumers or favors the biggest firms.

item.title: Europe is closing the door on offshore crypto, but it’s leaving the riskiest window open
item.description: MiCA was never meant to address the giant crypto derivatives market. That could pose a serious problem, says Patrick Gruhn, founder and chief executive of Perpetuals.com.

item.title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole rolls out euro stablecoin, EURXT
item.description: EURXT debuted with 20 million tokens in circulation, backed 1:1 by euro reserves at Caceis Bank, and competes with Circle's EURC and SocGen's EURCV.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. M2 money supply surpasses $23 trillion for the first time in history 👀 This is why we Bitcoin. Prepare accordingly 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBFd2NnWEE0QzA3UzhFS1RjNE5NTl9YcGtQRHB6YU5DWjB0Q0JSaGxPMHV1WnZjcHZ2YWZiYU1nQlRHWU5vZmNhUUJscmlfQTQ5cUZuQVUxUHprVlNDLWROTW5sMVV1LXM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. M2 money…

item.title: Morpho poised to scale as DeFi infrastructure play, Standard Chartered says
item.description: The bank initiated coverage of Morpho with a $60 end-2030 price target, saying its DeFi lending and onchain infrastructure businesses are positioned to benefit from tokenization growth.

item.title: Ethereum gets a new nonprofit focused on institutional adoption
item.description: The launch comes as the Ethereum Foundation narrows its focus to stewarding the core protocol, with independent organizations like EthLabs emerging to take on ecosystem functions such as research & development.

item.title: Citi slashes 12-month bitcoin, ether targets as ETF flows dry up
item.description: The bank cut its 12-month bitcoin and ether price targets after scrapping its ETF inflow forecasts, citing stalled U.S. crypto legislation and weak investor demand.

item.title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
item.description: The Bank of Korea’s governor praised tokenized government bonds for easing the issuance and management of government debt during a panel discussion at the ECB Forum.

item.title: Tokenized Google stock inflated 7,700% in rare DeFi lending exploit
item.description: An attacker inflated the value of a tokenized Google share used as collateral to about 78 times its real price, then borrowed against it, leaving roughly $403,000 in bad debt.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: What's next for Bitcoin and stocks? Analysts see a volatile second half
item.description: After AI drove equities higher while bitcoin lagged, market watchers expect macro policy and market structure to take center stage.

item.title: Mysterious Solana project World unveiled as fully onchain prediction market
item.description: The platform is now live within the Phantom wallet and at world.xyz, utilizing Chainlink as its primary oracle infrastructure for market data.

item.title: Circle CEO touts USDC's network advantage as OUSD emerges
item.description: Bernstein said OUSD could become the strongest new challenger to the Circle-Tether duopoly, while flagging unresolved questions around governance, operations and revenue sharing.

item.title: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents
item.description: Open USD takes a shot at USDC and USDT, with backing from heavy hitters including Visa, Mastercard and Google.

item.title: Bitcoin opens the third quarter in an historical red zone after rare losing first half
item.description: Bitcoin fell in both the first and second quarters of 2026, only the third time it has opened a year that way. In the two earlier instances, 2018 and 2022, the second half brought no rescue.

item.title: Europe is rewriting its landmark crypto rulebook MiCA as hard July 1 deadline passes
item.description: The EU is reviewing whether its landmark crypto regulation MiCA needs updating for a market reshaped by stablecoins and tokenization.

item.title: Last-minute MiCA approvals mark end of EU transition period
item.description: A final wave of MiCA approvals expanded Europe's roster of licensed crypto firms as the transitional period came to a close.

item.title: Taiwan Passes Sweeping Crypto Law With Licensing, Stablecoin Rules
item.description: The new law puts virtual asset firms under FSC oversight for the first time and sets reserve-and-trust rules for stablecoins.

item.title: Ark Invest bought more than $75 million of crypto shares during June bloodbath
item.description: Ark Invest has a tendency to "buy the dip," loading up on shares in cryptocurrency companies when their prices are depressed.

item.title: 🇵🇱 2,000 CRYPTO FIRMS FACE SHUTDOWN RISK AS POLAND REJECTS MICA LICENSES Poland’s president has blocked the country’s MiCA implementation law, blocking its regulator from issuing crypto licenses. This makes Poland the only EU country - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE54LVVUSGw2bXRGYUtrS0tRb1JfZmY0d1N0a3lEUGtxb0x5OG1FV0VlOGpwSHZLM3QybDJJcjFmcUtBOWVrekZONTNYMUI1aUQ2dThTMnVmeVRCeWJMeTJLRA?oc=5" target="_blank">🇵🇱 2,000 CRYPTO FIRMS FACE SHUTDOW…

item.title: XRP, HYPE funds are the bright spots as investors flee bitcoin, ether ETFs
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 1, 2026

item.title: Crypto enters Q3 with thinner liquidity but less leverage after Q2 reset: Talos
item.description: Bitcoin and Ether open interest fell sharply after $8.35 billion in long liquidations, while ETF outflows, weaker Strategy purchases and declining market depth reduced liquidity.

item.title: THE WINKLEVOSS TWINS ARE SELLING BITCOIN The Winklevoss Twins just moved $60M of BTC to Gemini, and $7M of ETH. This activity pattern matches usual selling patterns (custody > hot wallet). The Winklevosses still hold over $300M of BTC. They ma - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBQMGlhU01ORS1XUzVIYktjemluUHNIWXhSbld3aElkLVJlNE50MV8tWTNSUEQzS2djVE5Rc0U2dFhUMFgyYzYwZzdfY08zN3FmZFZuTXJMUXhRbjQ?oc=5" target="_blank">THE WINKLEVOSS TWINS ARE SELLING BITCOIN Th…

item.title: 🚨 JUST IN: Citi cuts its 12-month Bitcoin forecast to $82,000 from $112,000 as crypto ETF flows turn negative, per Reuters. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1fX1hGWVVYTjRGQWpqTWFXQVkydFp6QzZ0SURTaHhoMWlQUXVwVGtRYUc4MHFlWkxuamhiWWhzcTgxQlBoZndnbzVWLUotN3M1MmczaEZTcF9QVE9hV3lSTlAxbFU?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 JUST IN: Citi cuts its 12-mo…

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs lose record $4.5B in June, eclipsing Strategy's $1.25B raise
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record $4.5 billion in June outflows, pushing year-to-date totals to $5.5 billion, signaling an unprecedented pace of withdrawals.

item.title: Bitcoin closed June at $58,526 BELOW 200 week moving average ($62k) ABOVE realized cost price ($52k) ALL previous bear market bottoms were below realized price ... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1QbE9CYURMeEdiNmU2MVI5dERsUGY2ejRMc3ZoYXNQbDFFMEdZTGdzb0VUMG1ET0tMREhLb0R5dVcwc0k1VWlBcXQ1c09YM2F3NzV4cEdiWmtRQVU4WDZDSDV4aU9SQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin closed June at $58,5…

item.title: Goliath Ventures CEO Pleads Guilty to $250M Crypto Ponzi Scheme
item.description: Christopher Delgado’s "liquidity pool" fraud took in at least $400 million, with the proceeds spent on mansions, Lamborghinis, and Rolexes.

item.title: Former Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400M crypto Ponzi case
item.description: Former Goliath Ventures CEO Christopher Delgado pleaded guilty to fraud and money laundering and agreed to forfeit properties, vehicles, luxury goods and crypto wallets.

item.title: Bitcoin likely has another parabolic cycle ahead. Yes, capital efficiency is declining. In 2011, just $2.7B in net capital inflows drove a 55,436% price increase. This cycle, $697B produced a +689% return. The next parabolic bull cycle likely requires deeper instit - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFByam80eERyUGN6azhzVkFnaFhWTWhZWXM2ZGc0RzI4X3duT0NleWpaVHI5MER4Q0lHaWhwcW9oc2ZqaHZRUnZkQ25QX3FOVENHOC1vLVRmb2cyN20tRzFobEpB?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin likely has another parabol…

item.title: Taiwan’s legislature passes crypto, stablecoin regulations
item.description: Taiwan’s legislative branch has passed the nation’s first crypto and stablecoin rules, which aim to integrate the country with the global crypto market.

item.title: Anthropic to bring back Fable 5 as US lifts export controls
item.description: Claude Fable 5 will be redeployed with a new set of classifiers designed to identify and block a broader range of cybersecurity-related tasks.

item.title: Trump earned more from crypto than real estate in 2025, filings show
item.description: Memecoin sales and royalties made the most money for Trump last year, more than all of his golf courses combined.

item.title: Director of ‘47 Ronin’ who gambled Netflix funds on crypto gets 30 months
item.description: Carl Rinsch will serve two and a half years in prison for taking money meant for a Netflix show to buy Dogecoin, stocks and luxury goods.

item.title: UK crypto investors sue Binance, Changpeng Zhao for $200M
item.description: One Binance customer said he lost the equivalent of more than $132,000 from the crypto exchange’s derivatives offerings before restrictions were imposed on Binance.

item.title: NEW: Dubai braces for a wave of European crypto founders fleeing ahead of MiCA's July 1 deadline, with inquiries up to 120+ a week. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE55NEZiMFQ0a3ZabDZ5eVlkZG5TTlZSaklkSlpCOThLSlRyUFpXZVZRV214eTdPdGhYV3BfUzlvZGNUbG81dDVyODhaU3g2UmRvRlVERU55SzdMRFlNSkE?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Dubai braces for a wave of Europea…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $58,000 as levered liquidations accelerate. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9GVFQ4bXV4VGpucHpDcFJSV016azZyWDBmNGtjZ3BFdVB2UTc5dmdJNHV6Z1V0em9QQWQ1OXViMktZV3FjQmx6aGhHR3pfMUQ1U3V2eExtV2RLMnJvZXc4T3RLN2ZkZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Ethereum for Governments and Institutions: Why neutral infrastructure matters now
item.description: Current global shifts clearly signal a critical need for shared, neutral digital public infrastructure outside the control of any single centralized actor. As a public, programmable network designed to operate without reliance on any singl…

item.title: Has Strategy’s capital overhaul put an end to ‘death spiral’ fears?
item.description: Strategy's latest plan includes MSTR and STRC buybacks, expanded cash reserves and even potential Bitcoin sales. Will it be enough to defuse the overheated “death spiral” fears?

item.title: Trump Discloses Over $1.2 Billion in Crypto Earnings, $50M in Bitcoin Holdings
item.description: The president’s annual financial disclosure report was released on Tuesday.
